ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock information was last updated */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on this date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on this date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on this date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on this date */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for splits and dividends */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock price was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watched_stocks" (
  "watch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watched stock entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is watching this stock */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being watched */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User's notes or comments about the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watched_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watched_stocks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns this dashboard */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dashboard was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the dashboard was last modified */,
  "layout" TEXT /* JSON string representing the layout of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard this widget belongs to */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this widget displays */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of widget (e.g., chart, gauge, table) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the widget on the dashboard */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the widget */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* JSON string representing the configuration settings of the widget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set this alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this alert is for */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was set */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
